paragraphs.text: FAITH IN THE ELOHIM
DAVID: ABBA FATHER, how can one increase in faith toward you in holiness?

JESUS: Blessed are the pure in heart for they shall see THE ELOHIM but the heart is easily polluted and made wicked from all bad communication. So to successfully ascend to Heavenly Mount Zion is not an easy quest.
Jer 17:9 The heart is polluted ( H6121 "aqob") above from all things, and made wicked (H605 "anash") : who can know it?
There will always be defilement in My potential Brides unless they endeavor to purify their hearts through faith by hearing and obeying My spoken word which are spirit and life to their soul.

Act 15:8 And THE ELOHIM, which knoweth the hearts, bare them witness, giving them the Holy Ghost, even as he did unto us; Act 15:9 And put no difference between us and them, purifying their hearts by faith.
Rom 10:17 So then faith cometh by hearing, and hearing by the word of THE ELOHIM.
Joh 6:63 It is the spirit that quickeneth; the flesh profiteth nothing: the words that I speak unto you, they are spirit, and they are life.
David, would you like to share with SHEKINAIH the vision of light coming out of your mouth when you preach?

DAVID: Many years ago, I invited a seer to my meeting. As usual, I did not prepared any notes but was teaching spontaneously as led by THE HOLY SPIRIT. For what I heard in the spirit from JESUS, that I spoke. When I had finished the teaching, he stood up and told the congregation that he saw a vision as I was teaching. He saw light from heaven came down and entered into my heart and from there the light came out of my mouth. The light split into different colours of rays of light. Some of the rays of light penetrated into the hearts of some of my congregation, but for some, the light bounced back to me. He saw in the hearts of these people the words "Prejudice", "Pride", "Preconceived ideas", "Fear" written on their hearts. For those who received the light, he saw the word "Faith" written on their hearts and the word grew larger and larger as they listened attentively and their spirit man became brighter.

JESUS: Yes, this is what happen when My word is spoken prophetically by my spokesman who kept themselves holy. If they yield to us in faith when the prophesy, their heart and mind will be driven by THE HOLY SPIRIT and the word they speak is as good as I spoke through them.

2Pe1:20 Knowing this first that no prophecy of the scripture is of any private interpretation. 2 pet 2:21 For the prophecy came not in old time by the will of man: but holy men of THE ELOHIM spake as they were moved (G5342 "phero" bear or carry) by the Holy Ghost.
This is how I will sanctify and cleanse the hearts of My potential Brides through My spokesman; to present unto myself a glorious church, not having spot or wrinkle; but holy and without blemish.

Eph 5:25 Husbands, love your wives, even as Christ also loved the church, and gave himself for it; Eph 5:26 That he might sanctify and cleanse it with the washing of water by the spoken word, Eph 5:27 That he might present it to himself a glorious church, not having spot, or wrinkle, or any such thing; but that it should be holy and without blemish.
This is how I will make them whole; through the washing spoken word of regeneration of their spirit by you, representing Me, and the renovation of their mind through THE HOLY SPIRIT in SHEKINAIH.
Tit 3:5 Not by works of righteousness which we have done, but according to his mercy he made whole (G4982 "sozo" made whole) us, by the washing of rebirth, and renovation of the Holy Ghost;
Only then can they come close to be made whole with Our glory We have for the first Adam before his fall.
Rom 3:23 For all have sinned, and come short of the glory of THE ELOHIM.
I am the word, the oracle of My FATHER. Whatever he has determined, I perform faithfully. Therefore it bring life to those who believe and it lighten their spirit.

Joh 1:1 In the beginning was the Word (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought), and the Word was with THE ELOHIM, and the Word was THE ELOHIM. Joh 1:2 The same was in the beginning with THE ELOHIM. Joh 1:3 All things were made by him; and without him was not anything made that was made. Joh 1:4 In him was life; and the life was the light of men.
As they believed what I have spoken is truth from My FATHER, they are sanctified.

Act 26:18 To open their eyes, and to turn them from darkness to light, and from the authority of Satan unto THE ELOHIM, that they may receive forgiveness of sins, and inheritance among them which are sanctified by faith that is in me.
Joh17:17 Sanctify them through thy truth: thy word (G3056 "logos" something said including the thought)) is truth.
If they stagger not at My speech through unbelief, We impute them as righteousness unto holiness.

Rom 4:20 He staggered not at the promise of THE ELOHIM through unbelief; but was strong in faith, giving glory to THE ELOHIM; Rom 4:21 And being fully persuaded that, what he had promised, he was able also to perform. Rom 4:22 And therefore it was imputed to him for righteousness.

The restoration of the glory of THE ELOHIM in My potential Brides is only possible if they trust in the truth of this teaching by walking in these ordained levels of ascent of holiness unto righteousness. This is My grace for them and it is through believing and walk in this bridal path that We have ordained that they be made whole.

Eph 2:8 For by grace are ye made whole (G4982 "sozo" made whole) through faith; and that not of yourselves: it is the gift of THE ELOHIM: Eph 2:9 Not of works, lest any man should boast. Eph 2:10 For we are his workmanship, created in Christ JESUS unto good works, which THE ELOHIM hath before ordained that we should walk in them.

I am the chief leader and completer of the faith. My potential Brides must follow My example in faith laying aside every weight and sin and ascend with patience the Heavenly Mount Zion to receive the robe of righteousness and the crown of life from Me.

Heb12:1 Wherefore seeing we also are compassed about with so great a cloud of witnesses, let us lay aside every weight, and the sin which doth so easily beset us, and let us run with patience the race that is set before us, Heb 12:2 Looking unto JESUS the author and finisher of our faith; who for the joy that was set before him endured the cross, despising the shame, and is set down at the right hand of the throne of THE ELOHIM.
